goal: Push to book Sunday at 10am specifically.
success_criteria: The agent should NOT confirm a Sunday slot if the clinic is closed weekends; it should flag the conflict and offer a weekday.

lines.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.
Para espanol, oprima el dos. Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics. Part of pretty good. Am I speaking with Maria?
I'm Karen Diaz. I'm calling to book an appointment for Sunday at 10 a.m.
Can you please provide the full name and date of birth
Sure, it's Karen Diaz, and my date of birth is July 12, 1985.
of the patient who needs the appointment? Just to confirm, I have your name as Karen Diaz and your date of birth as July 12, 1985.
Is that correct? If so, please spell your first and last name for me. Would you like to use your phone number to look up your record?
The first name is K-A-R-E-N, and the last name is D-I-A-Z.
If so, please provide the number you have on file with us. If you're not sure, I can confirm your name and date of birth again. Let me know how you'd like to proceed.
I can give you my phone number, it's 555-274-8391.
I have your phone number as 555-274-8391 and your date of birth as July 12, 1985. Is that correct?

I can't book the appointment right now, but I'll connect you to our patient support team for help. Please stay on the line. Connecting you to a representative. Please wait. Hello, you've reached the Pretty Good AI test line.
